reasoning: The Left were the only ones who at least came and talked to us, even if they're weak now and lost the state long ago. TMC comes only when they want votes and treats our community with disrespect. BJP does not even pretend we matter — their minister Shantanu Thakur is Matua, their whole story is about Hindu refugees and Bengali castes, not about adivasis. None of them will give me steady MGNREGA work or protect our forest rights, but Left Front will not insult us in the process.
primary_drivers: Historical connection to Left despite their weakness
Rejection of TMC's arrogance toward his community
BJP's irrelevance to adivasi concerns — their narrative is Hindu/refugee/caste, not adivasi
